title: Default Broad Operability Program
objective: Track the legacy built-in default broad-operability branch while governed queue follow-on families continue behind it.
branch_rationale: The live runtime still uses a built-in default broad-operability plan for the currently active director. This program definition lets the queue and portfolio summaries explain that active plan instead of treating it as an untracked orphan.
positive_hypotheses: The risk-controlled broad momentum seed remains the operational control while newer guarded family branches queue behind it.
Tracking the built-in default plan explicitly avoids false queue-health warnings while the legacy branch finishes.

seed_stack.label: Risk seed control
seed_stack.rationale: Current built-in default broad-operability control branch.

seed_stack.label: Drawdown pivot fallback
seed_stack.rationale: Fallback pivot already encoded in the built-in default plan.

campaign_path.label: Risk Seed
campaign_path.purpose: Track the active built-in broad-operability seed.

campaign_path.label: Drawdown Pivot
campaign_path.purpose: Fallback pivot for the legacy built-in broad-operability branch.

stop_conditions.when: Any step in the legacy branch passes the promotion policy.
The legacy built-in broad-operability branch exhausts its final pivot without producing a promotion-eligible candidate.
